author: Morihiro Saito
title: Traditional Aikido
publisher: Minato Research & Publishing (dist. Japan Publications Trading Co.)
citation: Saito, Morihiro. Traditional Aikido. 5 vols. Tokyo: Minato Research, 1973-1976.
notes: Ingested via tools/ingest -> 217 techniques, 940 keyframes. Per-volume detail in tools/ingest books.py and resources/books/processed/*/book.json.

author: Gozo Shioda; Yasuhisa Shioda
title: Total Aikido: The Master Course
citation: Shioda, Gozo, and Yasuhisa Shioda. Total Aikido: The Master Course. Tokyo: Kodansha International, 1996.
notes: Yoshinkan; leading technical manual of the line.

author: Gozo Shioda
title: Dynamic Aikido
citation: Shioda, Gozo. Dynamic Aikido. Tokyo: Kodansha International, 1977.

author: Kisshomaru Ueshiba
title: Aikido
citation: Ueshiba, Kisshomaru. Aikido. Tokyo: Hozansha Publishing, 1985.

author: Yoshimitsu Yamada
title: Aikido Complete
citation: Yamada, Yoshimitsu. Aikido Complete. Secaucus, NJ: Citadel Press, 1981.
notes: Aikikai via USAF; the federation our promotion-list backbone covers.

author: Koichi Tohei
title: This Is Aikido: With Mind and Body Coordinated
citation: Tohei, Koichi. This Is Aikido: With Mind and Body Coordinated. Tokyo: Japan Publications, 1968.
notes: Ki Society lineage (pre-1974 split; Tohei still Aikikai chief instructor at publication).

author: Moriteru Ueshiba
title: Progressive Aikido: The Essential Elements
citation: Ueshiba, Moriteru. Progressive Aikido: The Essential Elements. Tokyo: Kodansha International, 2005.
notes: Aikikai mainline (3rd Doshu). Year to confirm on acquisition.

author: Kisshomaru Ueshiba; Moriteru Ueshiba
title: Best Aikido: The Fundamentals (Illustrated Japanese Classics)
citation: Ueshiba, Kisshomaru, and Moriteru Ueshiba. Best Aikido: The Fundamentals. Tokyo: Kodansha International, 2002.
notes: Aikikai mainline. Year to confirm on acquisition.

author: Moriteru Ueshiba
title: The Aikido Master Course: Best Aikido 2
citation: Ueshiba, Moriteru. The Aikido Master Course: Best Aikido 2. Tokyo: Kodansha International, 2003.
notes: Aikikai mainline; advanced companion to Best Aikido. Year to confirm on acquisition.
